outputs.label: IV Fluids
outputs.formula: IF(weight <= 10 AND weight * 100 <= 2400, weight * 100, IF(weight <= 20 AND weight > 10 AND 10 * 100 + (weight - 10) * 50 <= 2400, 10 * 100 + (weight - 10) * 50, IF(weight <= 30 AND weight > 20 AND 10 * 150 + (weight - 20) * 20 <= 2400, 10 * 150 + (weight - 20) * 20, IF(weight > 30 AND 10 * 170 + (weight - 30) * 10 <= 2400, 10 * 170 + (weight - 30) * 10, 2400))))
